data.title: XRP Is Down 60% While Bitwise Says Another Token Is Crypto's Most Mispriced Asset
data.description: XRP has plummeted 60% from its peak in July 2025, now trading around $1.37 to $1.45, despite various positive developments. This includes the settlement with the SEC, multiple partnerships, ETF investments, and the CLARITY Act approval. Goldman Sachs had a $154 million XRP ETF position, which they sold off completely by Q1 2026. The market saw a six-month downward trend from October 2025 to March 2026. Bitwise Chief Investment Officer calls HYPE the most undervalued crypto asset currently, highlighting the lack of movement in the market while institutional funds flowed into other sectors like AI and semiconductors.

data.title: GID Residential Partners Strengthens National Expansion With Boston Entry
data.description: GID, a well-established real estate company, disclosed their latest move into the Boston market through their national development platform, GID Residential Partners. With assets totaling $32.8 billion under management, the company aims to strengthen its presence in Boston with industry expert Chris Spendley taking the lead as Managing Director. This expansion builds upon GID’s extensive experience in multifamily development, marking a strategic shift for the company.

data.title: RYBREVANT® (amivantamab-vmjw) plus LAZCLUZE® (lazertinib) demonstrates prolonged clinical benefit as a first-line treatment for atypical EGFR-mutated non-small cell lung cancer
data.description: The combination of Johnson & Johnson's RYBREVANT® and LAZCLUZE® demonstrated a significant median overall survival of almost 3.5 years in patients with atypical EGFR-mutated disease. Consistent positive responses were noted across various atypical EGFR mutation subgroups, even in those historically linked to worse prognoses.

data.title: Mynd.ai Regains Compliance with NYSE American Filing Requirements Following Submission of Annual Report on Form 20-F
data.description: Today, Mynd.ai, Inc. ("Mynd" or the "Company"), listed on NYSE American as MYND, disclosed the completion of its Annual Report on Form 20-F for the fiscal year concluding on December 31, 2025. This filing was officially submitted to the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission.

data.title: Firebird to Join Armenia's National-Level Education Efforts to Support AI-Native Learning at Scale, Launches Firebird Labs
data.description: OpenAI, in collaboration with the Ministry of Education, Science, Culture, and Sport of Armenia and Firebird, aims to establish Armenia as a leading center for AI-focused education, research, startups, innovation, and venture development. Through their partnership, they seek to leverage the strengths of each organization to boost the country's standing in the global AI landscape. The alliance is set to pave the way for groundbreaking initiatives in the field, driving growth and opportunities in the sector.

data.title: Donaldson Company Increases Quarterly Cash Dividend 6.7%
data.description: Donaldson Company, Inc. declared a regular cash dividend of 32.0 cents per share, representing a 6.7% increase from the previous quarterly dividend of 30.0 cents per share. The dividend will be paid on June 30, 2026, to shareholders of record on June 15, 2026. In 2025, the company celebrated its 30th consecutive year of annual dividend increases and is listed on the S&P High-Yield Dividend Aristocrats Index.

data.title: The Inner Circle acknowledges Lauren M. Lopez as a Pinnacle Professional Member Inner Circle of Excellence for her contributions to Financial Excellence and Operational Innovation
data.description: In Rayne, Louisiana on May 29, 2026, Lauren M. Lopez has been recognized as a distinguished member of The Inner Circle for her outstanding achievements in Financial Excellence and Operational Innovation. Lopez, a Pinnacle Professional Member, has showcased remarkable contributions to these areas. Throughout her career, Lopez has established herself as a leader in her field, gaining significant recognition for her expertise in financial matters and innovative operational strategies.

data.title: The Inner Circle acknowledges Anna S Rickell as a 2026 Life Achiever
data.description: On May 29, 2026, in Spartanburg, South Carolina, Anna S. Rickell was honored as a 2026 Life Achiever for her notable accomplishments in promoting mental wellness over her fifty-year career in clinical social work. Her contributions were highlighted in The Inner Circle, recognizing her dedication to this cause. Anna S. Rickell's profound impact on Championing Mental Wellness Through Five Decades of Clinical Social Work has been widely celebrated.

data.title: The Inner Circle acknowledges Satish Peddada as an Inner Circle Lifetime
data.description: On May 29, 2026, in Hockessin, Delaware, Satish Peddada was recognized in The Inner Circle as an Inner Circle Lifetime for his significant contributions to Global Consulting and Strategic Advisory. His exceptional career in consulting has gained prominence, acknowledging his valuable insights and expertise.

data.title: The Inner Circle acknowledges Catherine B. Murphy as a Pinnacle Professional Member Inner Circle of Excellence
data.description: In Punta Cana, Florida, on May 29, 2026, Catherine B. Murphy was recognized as a distinguished Pinnacle Professional Member of the Inner Circle of Excellence in The Inner Circle. She was commended for her role as a Dedicated Director at Family Church PC. Catherine B. Murphy's dedication and contributions have set her apart in this prestigious group.

data.title: Universal Music Group N.V. Board of Directors Declines Unsolicited Pershing Square Proposal
data.description: In Hilversum, The Netherlands, on May 29, 2026, Universal Music Group N.V. (EURONEXT: UMG) made a public statement. The Company confirmed that its Board of Directors has reviewed and agreed upon an unsolicited and non-binding proposal. The Board, in unanimous decision, evaluated the proposal received by the company.

data.title: In HelloNation, Custom Pool Experts Danny Franke and Mike Scheck Outline What Drives Custom Pool Cost in Milton
data.description: A recent article delves into the factors influencing the pricing of custom pools for homeowners in Milton, Georgia. Released on May 29, 2026, the piece explores how site conditions, design preferences, and finishes all play a crucial role in determining the cost of a personalized pool. Understanding why the final price of a custom pool can be challenging to predict prior to the commencement of planning is a key focus of the HelloNation article. By analyzing these variables, homeowners in Milton can gain insights into the intricacies that contribute to the pricing of these unique home features.

data.title: /C O R R E C T I O N -- Florida International University/
data.description: As the Atlantic hurricane season begins, Florida International University (FIU) is making strides in hurricane and resilience research. On May 29, 2026, FIU announced significant progress in this field. With unprecedented funding of $5 million, FIU is expanding its research initiatives to better understand and prepare for the impacts of hurricanes. This investment will support the development of innovative strategies to enhance resilience against natural disasters. Through collaboration with experts in the field, FIU aims to provide valuable insights and solutions to mitigate the damage caused by hurricanes. The university's commitment to advancing research in this area highlights its dedication to safeguarding communities and infrastructure from the destructive forces of hurricanes and other extreme weather events.

data.title: Stock Market Today: Dow Hits 51,000, Helped By IBM, Salesforce; Logitech Soars (Live Coverage)
data.description: In recent market activity, the Dow Jones index surged to a record high on Friday following optimistic signs of a potential U.S.-Iran deal. Conversely, small-cap stocks experienced a decline. Notable performances included a significant rise in Dell's stock price. The market saw the Dow reaching 51,000 points, with strong contributions from companies like IBM and Salesforce. Additionally, Logitech demonstrated remarkable growth. This development showcases the dynamic nature of the market and the impact of current events and corporate performance on stock movements.

data.title: /C O R R E C T I O N -- Create Advertising Group/
data.description: Create Advertising Group has announced Jonathan Gitlin as the new CEO and has also expanded its global creative leadership. The appointment was made public on 29th May 2026, signifying a significant development within the company. This strategic move is aimed at enhancing creative initiatives and steering the company towards further growth and success. For more information and detailed updates, refer to the complete release from Create Advertising Group.

data.title: Mind Our Future Colorado Hosts Gubernatorial Candidate Forum on Youth Mental Health
data.description: A Policy Playbook was presented on May 28, 2026 in Denver by Mind Our Future Colorado for Colorado's upcoming governor. It highlighted actionable solutions for the state's youth mental health crisis. The event included candidates from all parties and aimed to address the pressing issue. The gathering emphasized the importance of tackling the crisis, as the state is facing increasing rates of mental health issues among youth. This initiative is crucial as statistics show a significant rise in mental health concerns among Colorado's younger population, with an estimated 30% increase in cases over the past five years. The Playbook aims to guide the next governor in implementing effective strategies to combat this crisis and provide support for youth mental health in the state.
